incr_counter: increment a named telemetry counter by one or more for feature usage tracking
get_counter: get the current value of a named telemetry counter by its key string
snapshot_counters: take a snapshot of all telemetry counters and session uptime in seconds
reset_counters: reset all telemetry counters to zero for use in test fixtures
review_metrics_module: review the in-memory per-session counters module for feature telemetry and thread safety
